title: evodia aromatica
intro: Evodia aromatica, also known as Chinese evodia or Wu Zhu Yu, is a plant species native to China, belonging to the Rutaceae family. It has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include analgesic, anti-inflammatory, and antiseptic effects. The health benefits of Evodia aromatica include relief from pain, fever reduction, and improved digestion, as well as potential applications in treating various conditions such as hypertension and rheumatism. In herbal preparations, Evodia aromatica is often used in combination with other medicinal herbs, and can be consumed as a tea, capsule, or tincture.
